text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after going out, Sakura Bakushin O
starts to look gloomy again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the day of her freckled classmate's departure
draws closer, her mood grows darker and darker.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...I know that Tracen Academy has many students
that come and go.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But for whatever reason, I believed that everyone
in the class would stay together, grow and
improve together, and then graduate together!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Even so, the day she'll leave us all is really
drawing near...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I want to do something for her as class
representative during the time she still has left...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh! That's a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It needs to be something memorable! Hmm, what
would be best?
choice_data_list: You could run together for fun.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Running?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time spent together training for her final race
ends up becoming a precious experience to
Sakura Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest they go on one last run together, just
for fun.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh ho! I'd expect nothing less of you! That's a
great idea!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That special training wasn't just important to her,
it was a precious memory for me too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll invite her first thing tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Sakura Bakushin O and her
freckled classmate meet near the tracks together.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It's a perfectly cloudless sky! The ideal
weather to Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It actually feels kind of nostalgic. Our special
training feels like it was so long ago!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I feel the same. Right, let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Don't hold back! Let's both give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'm not gonna lose, Baku!

text_block_list.name: Together
text_block_list.text: Yes! BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them race off with smiles brighter than
the sun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They continue running for as long as their energy
and time permit.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... That was a nice Bakushin from you!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You too, Baku! That was a super fun partner run!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...You know, I'm so grateful to you, Baku. And of
course to your trainer too.

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
This invigorating feeling is all thanks to the two
of you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so modest. I told you once before,
right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I just did what is expected of me as the class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ah... Was that all it was?

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And here I thought we had become good
friends...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
N-no! Of course, it was also because you're an
important friend to me!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you! ♪ Can we stay friends from here
on?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! No matter how far apart we are, you'll
always be my friend!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Forever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A song, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume at Tracen Academy share their
feelings in the form of races or concert
performances.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest to Sakura Bakushin O that she let her
classmate know how she feels by putting her
words into a song and doing a live show.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm also a student of Tracen Academy! What's
more, I'm also a genius and class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll compose the best song with the other class
members, and put on a live concert she'll never
forget!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Sakura Bakushin O and her
classmates reserve the gymnasium to put on a live
concert.
choice_data_list:
Come here, the main act should stand in the
middle!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Is this real? A concert just for me?!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Yup, yup! We worked hard to prepare everything!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks to everyone, we made a fantastic
song! I present you with the best song of
encouragement ever!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Your classmates are ready to start the
BAKUSHIN LIVE SHOW!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Eyes forward, and walk toward the future. ♪ Even
if we walk a different path. ♪

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's honest and sweet singing
voice, combined with her classmates' cheerful
clapping, echoes through the vicinity. But before
long...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Even though this is goodbye...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At a loss for words, Sakura Bakushin O's eyes fall
to the floor.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, I...

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text:
...Our hearts look straightforward, a direct link. ♪
Connecting us below the blue sky. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: E-everyone?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
(What am I doing? Wallowing in sentiment and
interrupting the performance...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
(I have to send her off with a song, as class
representative... as myself!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Is this goodbye? No! ♪ This is progress! ♪ We
move forward into the future!

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIN! BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O manages to compose herself
and the concert goes off without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I am really sorry for showing you such an
embarrassing side of me earlier.

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! Thank you for the wonderful
performance you put on for me!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...I will continue running even after leaving the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Our parting is just a "Bakushin straight for the
future," right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Yes! One day, let's run together again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with this farewell, Sakura Bakushin O
grows a little.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Cheer her on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Sakura Bakushin O is saddened by her
parting, the freckled girl is sure to be just as sad
about moving away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, if this continues, it'll be nothing more
than a tearful goodbye. So, I suggest she gives
her a cheerful send-off instead.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes, you're right. It's just as you say!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm going to put all my energy into one
final cheer to send her off!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That way she'll smile each time she thinks back on
her time at Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the day of parting comes...

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, thank you for coming to see me off!
You even brought your trainer, Baku!
choice_data_list: All the best at your next place.

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yes! All the best to you two as well!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I really wanted to stay together in the same class and graduate together... Sniff.

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Baku...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But I made up my mind! I'm going to see you off
with a big smile as class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Everyone! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
GO! GO! FIGHT! FULL STEAM AHEAD! SUPER
BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text:
GO! GO! FIGHT! FULL STEAM AHEAD! SUPER
BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Along with her classmates, Sakura Bakushin O
gives a warm cheer to her departing friend.

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I'm really sad to leave you all, but I'll
do my best at my new location!
choice_data_list: Ah, I think that's the sign to board.

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I have to go now. Take care, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As everyone watches the girl hurry toward the
boarding gate, Sakura Bakushin O hurriedly
chases after her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...H-hold on! Let me say one last thing!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No matter how far apart we are, I will always be
your class representative! That alone will never
change!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...That's right!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I was able to be in the same class as
you... and to have you as my class representative!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her friend is out of sight, Sakura Bakushin O
looks at the ground dejectedly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But just as quickly she raises her face and looks at
us with an energetic expression once more.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's go back, everyone! We have to make sure
our fame spreads throughout the country to make
up for our missing member!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's aim for a bright future! Bakushin,
BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her cheerful voice reverberates around the
vicinity, adding a little warmth to the hearts of
everyone present.
